title: Google Sheets preview
description: Preview a bounded sheet range with headers and sample rows.

spreadsheet_id.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID, same as Drive file ID.

sheet_name.description: Optional sheet tab name. Defaults to the first sheet.

range.description: Optional A1 notation range. When omitted, reads from A1 using max_rows/max_columns.

max_rows.description: Maximum rows to preview. Defaults to 20.

max_columns.description: Maximum columns to preview. Defaults to 10.
